title: Softshade
description: Softshade by XSER: clean, soft-toned wool textures for BedWars (1.8.9). Lightweight, PvP-focused, and instantly compatible.
body:
Softshade — BedWars Wool (1.8.9)

Softshade is a PvP-focused resource pack that retextures all 16 wool colors with smooth gradients, reduced noise, and balanced hues — perfect for BedWars and other fast-paced PvP modes.
Optimized for Minecraft 1.8.9, this pack keeps your game looking clean while making block colors instantly recognizable in competitive play.

✨ Features

All 16 wool blocks reworked with soft shading and high clarity.

Legacy 1.8.9 texture paths for full compatibility with older clients.

Minimal noise for better focus in PvP.

Lightweight — no extra assets or lag.

Custom pack icon and styled description.

📦 Installation

Download the .zip file.

Move it into your .minecraft/resourcepacks folder.

Enable the pack in-game (place it at the top for priority).

Join a BedWars match and enjoy!
